name: studio.update_navigation
description: Replace the navigation tree on an Actium Studio site. Accepts a nested array of menu items with label + href + children.
whenToUse: Add a new top-level menu item after creating a net-new page (e.g. '/pricing') that should be discoverable.
Restructure site IA during a rebrand — swap the entire navigation tree in one atomic write.
Remove dead links: rebuild the menu after deleting pages so the nav no longer points at 404s.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants a partial edit (add one item, keep the rest) — fetch via studio.get_navigation first, mutate client-side, then write back; this skill is whole-tree replacement.
Caller wants to rename a page URL — use studio.update_page; update_navigation only edits menu entries, not the underlying pages.
Caller is about to point menu items at slugs that haven't been created — pre-flight via studio.list_pages to avoid broken links.
